current.headline: The Software That Plans 650 Neighborhoods a Week Has Never Walked Through One
current.parked_reason: Critics averaged 7.3/10 after 3 rounds (threshold 8.5). Persistent weaknesses: no original interviews, single case study (Montgomery Farm) carrying too much weight, structural template predictability. Article factually corrected but needs original reporting to reach publish threshold.

last_completed.headline: The Houses Were Finished. They Sat Dark for Five Months Waiting for a Transformer.
